title: rubus vulgaris subsp. commutatus
intro: Rubus vulgaris subsp. commutatus, also known as the common blackberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family that is native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus vulgaris subsp. commutatus include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as providing relief from digestive issues and stress. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and jams, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
